mapper.sql: b.id, b.title, b.author, b.isbn, b.publisher, b.description, b.category_id, b.shelf_status, b.created_at, b.updated_at, b.deleted, c.name as category_name
mapper.select: select from books b left join categories c on b.category_id = c.id where b.id = #{id} and b.deleted = false
select from books b left join categories c on b.category_id = c.id where b.deleted = false and b.shelf_status = 'ON_SHELF' order by b.id desc

select from books b left join categories c on b.category_id = c.id where b.deleted = false and b.shelf_status = 'ON_SHELF' and ( b.title like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or b.author like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or b.isbn like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or c.name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') ) order by b.id desc
select from books b left join categories c on b.category_id = c.id where b.deleted = false order by b.id desc
select from books b left join categories c on b.category_id = c.id where b.isbn = #{isbn} and b.deleted = false
mapper.insert: insert into books(title, author, isbn, publisher, description, category_id, shelf_status, created_at, updated_at, deleted) values(#{title}, #{author}, #{isbn}, #{publisher}, #{description}, #{category.id}, #{shelfStatus}, now(), now(), false)
mapper.update: update books set title = #{title}, author = #{author}, isbn = #{isbn}, publisher = #{publisher}, description = #{description}, category_id = #{category.id}, shelf_status = #{shelfStatus}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update books set deleted = true, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM book WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE book SET category_id = NULL WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
